Landing.title: Design Your Own Digital Invitation
Landing.subtitle: Tap the 3D envelope, pick a date, create your invitation.

DateDialog.title: Pick Your Wedding Date
DateDialog.subtitle: We'll generate your invitation based on this. You can change it later.

onboarding.firstStep: Here you can fully customize every detail: text, fonts, colors, block order, and spacing. Let's walk through how the editor works step by step.
onboarding.editHint: Click any text in the invitation to open the editing panel on the right. You can change the wording, font, size, color, and alignment. The page updates instantly as you edit.
onboarding.buttonsHint: When you click a block, a small toolbar appears on top: move it up/down, hide it, or delete it. Use these to rearrange your invitation.
onboarding.hideButton: The eye icon hides a block from the invitation without deleting it. Guests just won't see it. Tap it again any time to bring it back.
onboarding.infoButton: The left panel has shortcuts like 'Enter Info' and 'Change Settings' for each block. Use them to upload photos to the gallery, edit the event program rows, set the venue address: everything block-specific lives here.
onboarding.styleButton: The 'Font Style' section on the right lets you change the font, size, color, and weight of any text. Browse modern, classic, handwritten and more, and your pick applies instantly.
onboarding.spacingButtons: At the bottom of the right panel, the 'Spacing' control fine-tunes top/bottom padding for each block. Use the '+ Add Block' buttons between sections to insert countdowns, galleries, RSVP forms and more wherever you like.
onboarding.yellowHint: Pale yellow backgrounds mark editable text. Click them to change content and tweak style. When you're done, hit 'Save' at the top to keep your work and 'Publish' to share the link with guests.

Publish.title: Your Invitation Is Live
Publish.subtitle: Share your invitation link to start inviting guests.
Publish.customLinkDesc: Create a readable, more prestigious link for your event.
